CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/SAUL FERSTER AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. SIGNED STIP. FILED & PARTIES STATE THEIR ACCEPTANCE & UNDERSTANDING OF THE SETTLEMENT TERMS ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, TIMOTHY JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 805 LEAVENWORTH STREET, APT. 801, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $525.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $525.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF MAY RETAIN DEFENDANT'S SECURITY AND KEY DEPOSIT OF $535.00. NO STAY OF EXECUTION.
